name: TOP_FUNCTIONS_LAST_3Y
description: Top functional categorys last last 3 years. Auto-generated from the core-four benchmark and aligned to the validated query-frame Cypher semantics.
cypher:
MATCH (ymax:Year)
WITH max(ymax.year) AS max_year
MATCH (f:Functional_of_Target)<-[:FUNCTIONED_AS]-(t:Target)<-[:HAS_TARGET]-(tp:TargetPair)<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y:Year)
WHERE y.year >= max_year - $years + 1
RETURN f.name AS functional_category, count(DISTINCT tp) AS targetpair_count, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count, collect(DISTINCT tp.name)[0..5] AS example_targetpairs
ORDER BY targetpair_count DESC, patent_count DESC, functional_category
LIMIT 10

examples: Across target-pair combinations disclosed in the last three years, which functional-of-target categories are most prevalent? Please report the top 10 and provide example target pairs for each.
In the last three years, which functional-of-target classes occur most often across all target-pair combinations? Please list the top 10 with representative target-pair examples.
Considering all target-pair combinations from the past three years, what are the most frequent functional-of-target categories? Please show the top 10 together with example matching pairs.
